data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Optional resale policy and fee rules', but there is no evidence provided that confirms this functionality is implemented or working as intended. The linked use case mentions the need for these rules, yet the prior steps do not include any evidence of the resale policy or associated fee rules. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding this specific functionality.
gaps: No evidence of optional resale policy and fee rules.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the optional resale policy and fee rules.
